diffs.before:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [1.1.1] - 2026-03-06

### Fixed
- Remove hardcoded `/v1` from OpenAI provider URL path

## [1.1.0] - 2026-03-06

### Added
- MCP tool support
- `web_search` built-in tool using Tavily Search API
- `url_fetch` built-in tool
- JSON `tool_call_details` in run output
- Refusal detection in JSON output
- Executable examples

### Changed
- Docker docs for running a single agent with selective mounts

## [1.0.0] - 2026-03-02

### Added
- Core CLI with `run`, `agents list`, `agents show`, `agents init`, `agents edit`, `gc`, and `config init` commands
- TOML-based agent configuration with SKILL.md context support
- Multi-provider LLM support: Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama
- Tool-calling system with `read_file`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, `list_directory`, and `run_command` tools
- Sub-agent orchestration with `call_agent` tool and depth-limited execution
- Agent memory system with XDG-compliant data storage and garbage collection
- Path security: `~` and `$VAR` expansion for user-supplied paths
- Stdin piping support for composing with Unix tools
- Dry-run mode and per-tool verbose logging
- Docker containerization support
- CI workflows: lint, test, build, and GoReleaser

### Fixed
- Arg validation UX and skill path resolution
- staticcheck/errcheck lint issues
- Duplicate error silencing, glob validation, and nil ExitError guard

[1.1.1]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1
[1.1.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.0.0...v1.1.0
[1.0.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/releases/tag/v1.0.0
diffs.after:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [1.2.0] - 2026-03-10

### Added
- OpenCode provider support
- HTTP request timeout (15s per-request) for `url_fetch` tool
- HTML tag stripping for `url_fetch` responses

## [1.1.1] - 2026-03-06

### Fixed
- Remove hardcoded `/v1` from OpenAI provider URL path

## [1.1.0] - 2026-03-06

### Added
- MCP tool support
- `web_search` built-in tool using Tavily Search API
- `url_fetch` built-in tool
- JSON `tool_call_details` in run output
- Refusal detection in JSON output
- Executable examples

### Changed
- Docker docs for running a single agent with selective mounts

## [1.0.0] - 2026-03-02

### Added
- Core CLI with `run`, `agents list`, `agents show`, `agents init`, `agents edit`, `gc`, and `config init` commands
- TOML-based agent configuration with SKILL.md context support
- Multi-provider LLM support: Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama
- Tool-calling system with `read_file`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, `list_directory`, and `run_command` tools
- Sub-agent orchestration with `call_agent` tool and depth-limited execution
- Agent memory system with XDG-compliant data storage and garbage collection
- Path security: `~` and `$VAR` expansion for user-supplied paths
- Stdin piping support for composing with Unix tools
- Dry-run mode and per-tool verbose logging
- Docker containerization support
- CI workflows: lint, test, build, and GoReleaser

### Fixed
- Arg validation UX and skill path resolution
- staticcheck/errcheck lint issues
- Duplicate error silencing, glob validation, and nil ExitError guard

[1.2.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.1.1...v1.2.0
[1.1.1]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1
[1.1.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.0.0...v1.1.0
[1.0.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/releases/tag/v1.0.0

parts.text:
You are working in /Users/jaronswab/go/src/github.com/jrswab/axe

Make the following file edits (do NOT commit or push — just edit the files):

1. **cmd/root.go line 12**: Change `const Version = "1.0.0"` to `const Version = "1.2.0"`

2. **cmd/version_test.go**:
   - Line 19: Change `want := "axe version 1.0.0\n"` to `want := "axe version 1.2.0\n"`
   - Line 26: Change `if Version != "1.0.0" {` to `if Version != "1.2.0" {`
   - Line 27: Change `t.Errorf("Version = %q, want %q", Version, "1.0.0")` to `t.Errorf("Version = %q, want %q", Version, "1.2.0")`

3. **internal/mcpclient/mcpclient.go line 43**: Change `Version: "1.0.0"` to `Version: "1.2.0"`

4. **CHANGELOG.md**: Prepend a new release section right after line 7 (after the "and this project adheres to..." line). Insert:

```
## [1.2.0] - 2026-03-10

### Added
- OpenCode provider support
- HTTP request timeout (15s per-request) for `url_fetch` tool
- HTML tag stripping for `url_fetch` responses
```

Also update the reference links at the bottom of CHANGELOG.md. The current bottom has:
```
[1.1.1]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1
[1.1.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.0.0...v1.1.0
[1.0.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/releases/tag/v1.0.0
```

Add this line at the top of the reference links section:
```
[1.2.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.1.1...v1.2.0
```

After making all edits, verify them by reading each file back and confirming the changes are correct. Return a summary of all changes made.
I'll make all the edits in parallel, then verify them.

import (
	"errors"
	"fmt"
	"os"

)

// Version is the hardcoded version constant for the CLI.

var rootCmd = &cobra.Command{
	Use:   "axe",
	Short: "Axe is a CLI tool for managing AI agents and skills",
	Long: `Axe is a command-line interface for managing AI agents, skills,
and configuration. It provides tools for setting up and organizing
your agent workspace.`,
	Example: `  axe version          Show the current version

<content>1: package mcpclient
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"fmt"
6: 	"net/http"
7: 	"strconv"
8: 	"strings"
9: 
10: 	"github.com/jrswab/axe/internal/agent"
11: 	"github.com/jrswab/axe/internal/envinterp"
12: 	"github.com/jrswab/axe/internal/provider"
13: 	"github.com/modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk/mcp"
14: )
15: 
16: // Client wraps an MCP session for one configured server.
17: type Client struct {
18: 	name        string
19: 	session     *mcp.ClientSession
20: 	closeFn     func() error
21: 	toolSchemas map[string]map[string]string // tool name -> param name -> type
22: }
23: 
24: // Connect initializes an MCP client session for one server config.
25: func Connect(ctx context.Context, cfg agent.MCPServerConfig) (*Client, error) {
26: 	headers, err := envinterp.ExpandHeaders(cfg.Headers)
27: 	if err != nil {
28: 		return nil, err
29: 	}
30: 
31: 	httpClient := &http.Client{Transport: &headerRoundTripper{base: http.DefaultTransport, headers: headers}}
32: 
33: 	var transport mcp.Transport
34: 	switch cfg.Transport {
35: 	case "sse":
36: 		transport = &mcp.SSEClientTransport{Endpoint: cfg.URL, HTTPClient: httpClient}
37: 	case "streamable-http":
38: 		transport = &mcp.StreamableClientTransport{Endpoint: cfg.URL, HTTPClient: httpClient}
39: 	default:
40: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unsupported MCP transport %q", cfg.Transport)
41: 	}
42: 
43: 	client := mcp.NewClient(&mcp.Implementation{Name: "axe", Version: "1.0.0"}, nil)
44: 	session, err := client.Connect(ctx, transport, nil)
45: 	if err != nil {
46: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("connect MCP server %q: %w", cfg.Name, err)
47: 	}
48: 
49: 	return &Client{name: cfg.Name, session: session}, nil
50: }
51: 
52: // Name returns the configured server name.
53: func (c *Client) Name() string {
54: 	return c.name
55: }

(Showing lines 1-55 of 223. Use offset=56 to continue.)
</content>

filediff.before:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [1.1.1] - 2026-03-06

### Fixed
- Remove hardcoded `/v1` from OpenAI provider URL path

## [1.1.0] - 2026-03-06

### Added
- MCP tool support
- `web_search` built-in tool using Tavily Search API
- `url_fetch` built-in tool
- JSON `tool_call_details` in run output
- Refusal detection in JSON output
- Executable examples

### Changed
- Docker docs for running a single agent with selective mounts

## [1.0.0] - 2026-03-02

### Added
- Core CLI with `run`, `agents list`, `agents show`, `agents init`, `agents edit`, `gc`, and `config init` commands
- TOML-based agent configuration with SKILL.md context support
- Multi-provider LLM support: Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama
- Tool-calling system with `read_file`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, `list_directory`, and `run_command` tools
- Sub-agent orchestration with `call_agent` tool and depth-limited execution
- Agent memory system with XDG-compliant data storage and garbage collection
- Path security: `~` and `$VAR` expansion for user-supplied paths
- Stdin piping support for composing with Unix tools
- Dry-run mode and per-tool verbose logging
- Docker containerization support
- CI workflows: lint, test, build, and GoReleaser

### Fixed
- Arg validation UX and skill path resolution
- staticcheck/errcheck lint issues
- Duplicate error silencing, glob validation, and nil ExitError guard

[1.1.1]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1
[1.1.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.0.0...v1.1.0
[1.0.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/releases/tag/v1.0.0

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/),

## [1.0.0] - 2026-03-02

### Added
- Core CLI with `run`, `agents list`, `agents show`, `agents init`, `agents edit`, `gc`, and `config init` commands
- TOML-based agent configuration with SKILL.md context support
- Multi-provider LLM support: Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama
- Tool-calling system with `read_file`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, `list_directory`, and `run_command` tools
- Sub-agent orchestration with `call_agent` tool and depth-limited execution
- Agent memory system with XDG-compliant data storage and garbage collection
- Path security: `~` and `$VAR` expansion for user-supplied paths
- Stdin piping support for composing with Unix tools
- Dry-run mode and per-tool verbose logging
- Docker containerization support
- CI workflows: lint, test, build, and GoReleaser

### Fixed
- Arg validation UX and skill path resolution
- staticcheck/errcheck lint issues
- Duplicate error silencing, glob validation, and nil ExitError guard

## [1.0.0] - 2026-03-02

### Added
- Core CLI with `run`, `agents list`, `agents show`, `agents init`, `agents edit`, `gc`, and `config init` commands
- TOML-based agent configuration with SKILL.md context support
- Multi-provider LLM support: Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama
- Tool-calling system with `read_file`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, `list_directory`, and `run_command` tools
- Sub-agent orchestration with `call_agent` tool and depth-limited execution
- Agent memory system with XDG-compliant data storage and garbage collection
- Path security: `~` and `$VAR` expansion for user-supplied paths
- Stdin piping support for composing with Unix tools
- Dry-run mode and per-tool verbose logging
- Docker containerization support
- CI workflows: lint, test, build, and GoReleaser

### Fixed
- Arg validation UX and skill path resolution
- staticcheck/errcheck lint issues
- Duplicate error silencing, glob validation, and nil ExitError guard

metadata.preview:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [1.2.0] - 2026-03-10

### Added
- OpenCode provider support
- HTTP request timeout (15s per-request) for `url_fetch` tool
- HTML tag stripping for `url_fetch` responses

## [1.1.1] - 2026-03-06

### Fixed
- Remove hardcoded `/v1` from OpenAI provider URL path

## [1.1.0] - 2026-03-06

parts.text:
All changes verified. Here's a summary:

**`cmd/root.go` (line 12)**
- `const Version = "1.0.0"` → `"1.2.0"`

**`cmd/version_test.go` (lines 19, 26, 27)**
- `want := "axe version 1.0.0\n"` → `"axe version 1.2.0\n"`
- `if Version != "1.0.0"` → `"1.2.0"`
- `t.Errorf(... "1.0.0")` → `"1.2.0"`

**`internal/mcpclient/mcpclient.go` (line 43)**
- `Version: "1.0.0"` → `"1.2.0"` in the MCP client implementation struct

**`CHANGELOG.md`**
- New `## [1.2.0] - 2026-03-10` section inserted at line 8 with three Added entries
- New `[1.2.0]: https://github.com/jrswab/axe/compare/v1.1.1...v1.2.0` reference link prepended to the links section (line 53)
